title: Halloween Hidden Object Games : Haunted House
description: Beautifully designed search and finder game with 30+ Autumn Season levels. Halloween Objects! Explore Fall Harvest by seeing Fall Foliage covered Forests and Creeks, New England Towns, Halloween Pumpkin Patches, Rustic Barns, Cornfields and more!
instructions: Hidden Objects Fall Harvest features Gorgeous Crisp Graphics reflecting Fall Autumn Thanksgiving Halloween themes 3 Game Modes- Traditional Chill Adventure Exciting Levels Scenes of Hidden Object Puzzles Artistically Crafted Levels
